ttl.name: TIRE PRESSURE WARNING VALVE AND TRANSMITTER

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE GRAND SPARE TIRE (w/ Grand Spare Tire)
REMOVE TIRE PRESSURE WARNING VALVE SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the valve core and cap, and release the air from the tire.

After ensuring that a sufficient amount of air has been released, remove the nut and washer that are used to secure the tire pressure warning valve and transmitter. Drop the tire pressure warning valve and transmitter inside the tire.

atten4.ptxt: Keep the removed cap, valve core, nut, and washer.

s2.ptxt: After dropping the tire pressure warning valve and transmitter into the tire, disengage the bead using the shoe of the tire remover.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the tire pressure warning valve and transmitter due to interference between the tire pressure warning valve and transmitter and the tire bead.

s2.ptxt: Remove the bead on the upper side in the usual way.
Take out the tire pressure warning valve and transmitter from the tire and remove the bead on the lower side in the usual way.

atten4.ptxt: Check that no cracks or damage are identified on the grommet. If any damage is found, replace the grommet, washer, and nut.
